title: Black Nouveau Simple Design Styrene Photo Frame 4x6
features: STYLISH ELEGANT DESIGN - Black colour contemporary plain design frame with protective plastic front, a simple way to add a elegant style to any room
PRESERVE YOUR TREASURED MEMORIES - Display your treasured photos and protect them from dust, moisture and also wear and tear through handling

VERSATILE AND FLEXIBLE - The orientation of these frames can be either landscape or portrait. Includes build-in wall mounting hanger or a versatile kickstand easel to allow you to display on desk or table top in your home and office
FITS FOR DIFFRENT OCCASIONS - Perfect gift for special occasion like Valentine's day, Birthday, Wedding, Anniversary, Christmas day. an be used for photographs, certificates and important documents
APPROX DIMENSIONS - Suitable for image Size: 4 x 6 (10 x 15cm) / Frame size is - 18 x 13cm (All Sizes are approximate)
description: Home collection is part of Design Group, a global suppier of celebration goods to over 11,000 retailers with 120+ years in business and 1.3bn products sold annually.
